insight: `IllegalArgumentException: Specified enchantment cannot be applied to this itemstack` during scanning means the `enchant-too-high` nerf step uses `addEnchantment()` which validates applicability — hacked items with non-applicable enchantments (e.g. Sharpness on boots) crash the scan, leaving remaining items unprocessed. Fixed in PR #80 by switching to `addUnsafeEnchantment()`.
